narratives.full_description:
Workshop by Nicolas Jaar — a fluid, collective listening space shaped by participants, moving away from the standard lecture format.

Moving away from the standard lecture format, we created a fluid, collective listening space where the session was shaped entirely by the participants in the room.

Making Useless Things 
 Making Useless Things 
 Nicolas Jaar 
 
 In collaboration with Urvakan, we’ve hosted a special workshop — Making Useless Things, with musician and writer Nicolás Jaar at the Yerevan Komitas State Conservatory. 
 
 Moving away from the standard lecture format, we created a fluid, collective listening space where the session was shaped entirely by the participants in the room. 
 
 We want to extend our thanks to everyone who joined us for your presence and curiosity. 
 
 And of course thanks to our partners who made this possible: Urvakan, the Yerevan Komitas State Conservatory, and, of course, Nicolás Jaar for sharing this knowledge! 
 
 
 Partners 
 Partners 
 
 Nicolas Jaar

 Urvalan Festival 
 https://www.instagram.com/urvakanfestival/ 
 
The State Philharmonia of Armenia has been  established in 1930. Throughout its activity, Philharmonia has played a significant role in preserving and developing Armenian musical culture. International educational and cognitive projects, concerts, festivals, competitions, master classes, presentations are organised by the institution. Philharmonia is also engaged in the production of scientific-cognitive films and publishing. The mission of Philharmonia is to contribute to the development of the country's cultural sector by presenting the best works of Armenian and world art.
